poetry.description: Not a poetry project, but supersedes default pep manager if left enabled.

packageRules.description: Python version in CI matrix is a manual decision

description: The pyarrow pin for python_version < '3.10'; 22.0.0 raised requires-python to >=3.10.
Renovate drops the PEP 508 marker, so both pins of a split dependency look identical to it: matchCurrentVersion tells them apart, and the cap itself comes from each release's requires_python.
Only old pins are capped, on purpose. A new pin or an unsplit dependency dropping an old Python should open a PR that fails CI, not freeze silently.
The constraint must be a bare version: pep440 has no subset(), so a range would filter out every release.

packageRules.description: The pytest pin for python_version < '3.10'; 9.0.0 raised requires-python to >=3.10.
The polars pin for python_version < '3.10'; 1.37.0 raised requires-python to >=3.10.
The pandas pins for python_version < '3.11', both the test pin and the pandas extra; 3.0.0 raised requires-python to >=3.11.

description: The pandas and polars extras declare the range this package supports, not a pin to keep current. Widening them is a support decision, not a dependency update.
Matched on the raw value because matchCurrentVersion cannot read a range: package rules run before the lookup, and a range only resolves to a currentVersion inside it.
